## Scope

- [ ] No unrelated refactor.
- [ ] Public behavior documented.

## Verification

- [ ] `uv sync --locked`
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] MCP stdio smoke, if behavior changed.
- [ ] MCP client smoke, if public tools changed.
